titleStmt.title: SII 28.15: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 15. (A.R. No. 15 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple, Central Shrine, south and west bases.

Fragmentary. Refers to Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟai Mahādēvar and land 500 kuḷi in extent and kollai-mēḍu, apparently in the enjoyment of the temple. The channel of Attiyūr is mentioned among the boundaries. Another piece refers to Tēṉūr in Muḍikoṇḍa-chōḷa-vaḷanāḍu and the boundaries of a dēvadāna land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅka coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 5Continuation missing.
ṟavāna puṉceyt tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiya mahādevarContinuation missing.
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Attiyūr vāykkālukkuContinuation missing.
laiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa kuḻi 5 100ṉā nilaṅkaḷum kollaimeṭumContinuation missing.
Another pieceThis may appear to be a continuation of the first of three lines of the first piece.in some what different hand.

5āvatu muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu teṉūr vi Continuation missing.
devadānattukku kīḻpāṟkellai kuṭṭattāḻi nilattukku EContinuation missing.
devadānattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ātrayattattaṉ nilattukku teContinuation missing.
Digital edition of SII 28.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
